task: Open /home/user/Documents/article.odt in LibreOffice Writer. The document has 5 paragraphs of plain text. Change the style of the first paragraph ('The Future of Renewable Energy') to 'Heading 1'. Change the style of the third paragraph ('Solar Power Advancements') to 'Heading 2'. Add a new paragraph at the end with the text 'Last updated: April 2026'. Make this last paragraph bold. Save the file.

verification.eval: any(p.get('text', '') == 'Last updated: April 2026' for p in result.get('paragraphs', []))
